_instructions: This file draws the 'Blacksmith Fork River' schematic page (the entire Blacksmith Fork system, its own standalone page).
See public/schematics/README.md for the full field reference and a longer walkthrough - this is the quick version.
NODES: each node is a card on the diagram, listed in the order the water actually flows.
id         - unique within this file. Tributaries/diversions/links reference another node's id via connectsTo.
name       - for kind 'mainstem'/'tributary'/'diversion', must fuzzy-match a live station's display name from
HydroServer/DWRi/USGS. For 'junction'/'link' nodes it is just label text.
kind       - 'mainstem' (a real gauge station on the main channel), 'junction' (invisible connection point, no card),
'tributary'/'diversion' (a side attachment - see nibley_junc/dwri_nibley below), or 'link' (a card with
no live data of its own that just navigates to another schematic page). This page has no 'terminus'
node - it flows out via the 'to_lower_logan' link node instead, since Blacksmith Fork joins the main
Logan River channel rather than ending at Cutler Reservoir directly.
connectsTo - tributary/diversion/link only: omit for a 'link' node that's just the next stop on the main channel (see
to_lower_logan below).
side       - tributary/diversion only, when connectsTo is set: 'left' or 'right', which side of the main channel to
draw the card on - meant to reflect which bank of the river the station is really on.
colorGroup - optional; must match a name from waterway_groups or schematic_groups in config/station_config.yaml.
linkTo     - optional on any node; the schematic page slug to navigate to on click. On a 'link' node it's the entire
point of the card.
label      - linkTo button text override (defaults to name).
There's no separate edges list - the main channel line and every diversion's connector are derived automatically from
kind + connectsTo + side + the order nodes appear above.
To add a new station: add a node with kind 'mainstem' at the right point in the list.
The 'to_lower_logan' node at the bottom is the reciprocal of the 'bsf_ext' link node on lower-logan.json - do not delete
one without the other.
title: Blacksmith Fork River
subtitle: The full Blacksmith Fork River system
